title: Yachl@'el #3177
definition:
Jahleel = "God waits"

 1) the 3rd of the 3 sons of Zebulun; founder of the family of the
    Jahleelites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jahleel = "God waits"

 1) the 3rd of the 3 sons of Zebulun; founder of the family of the
    Jahleelites

    NASB:  wait for God, a Zebulunite
